svg.text: Heap Sort Phase 2: Extract Max Repeatedly
Swap data[0] (the max) to the end, shrink the heap by 1, re-heapify. Repeat.
Each step: swap data[0] to end of unsorted region, shrink heap, re-heapify to restore max at [0]
Swap data[0] (95) with last element (32). 95 is now in its final position.
Re-heapify: 32 sinks down (same as Phase 1). 32 < 62 → swap. Then 32 < 55 → swap again.
Steps 2-6: same process -- swap, shrink, re-heapify
Each extraction: swap + re-heapify = O(log n). Done n times = O(n log n). All in-place = O(1) space
